title: Four Dramatic Character Portraits
sourceTitle: Four Dramatic Character Portraits From Reference Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image four-character cinematic portrait transformation from one uploaded photo, preserving face structure, eye spacing, nose, lips, jawline, hairline, and natural age impression. Subject: The uploaded identity is reinterpreted as detective, fugitive, nightclub singer, and rooftop lookout, with face structure, eye spacing, nose, lips, jawline, hairline, and natural age impression preserved across all four portraits and dark coats, satin collar details, leather gloves, and subtle noir props adapted to each role. Scene: rainy neon city alley expanded from the original street background expands the original background into a consistent cinematic world shared by all four character portraits. Composition: Four coordinated mid-close-up portraits in one dramatic set, each using a wide-angle lens feel, extreme dynamic camera angle, powerful complex pose, and consistent expanded background logic. Signature Elements: Four distinct role portraits from one identity, consistent background expansion, preserved face structure, sharp wardrobe system, dramatic poses, crisp textures, and unified color grading. Style: Photorealistic cinematic character-portrait set with high contrast, crisp textures, precise color grading, dramatic movement, intense perspective, and movie-poster realism. Color Palette: Unified cinematic color grade tied to the shared world, with strong contrast, textured shadows, controlled highlights, and coherent palette continuity across all four portraits. Lighting: Cinematic high-contrast lighting, directional highlights, deep shadows, crisp facial detail, and role-specific rim light while preserving one consistent world. Camera: Mid close-up framing with wide-angle lens energy, extreme dynamic camera angles, intense perspective, and powerful pose design for each character. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
